settings.title: Settings

welcome.title: Ready to take control of your finances?
welcome.subtitle: A few quick questions to personalize your experience

quiz.q1Title: What's your biggest frustration with money?
quiz.q1Subtitle: Be honest, this stays between us
quiz.q1_dont_know_where: I don't know where my money goes
quiz.q1_stress: I stress when I think about my finances
quiz.q1_plan_better: I'd like to plan my spending better
quiz.q2Title: How long has this been going on?
quiz.q2_always: As long as I can remember
quiz.q3Title: What would change if you controlled your finances?

empathy.searchSpeech: Hmm, let me take a closer look...
empathy.resultSpeech: Found it! Here's what I think about you
empathy.headline_dont_know_where: 72% of people don't know where their money goes
empathy.headline_plan_better: Planning is already taking back control
empathy.statDefault: Most people who start tracking their expenses see improvement within 30 days.
empathy.stat_dont_know_where: Users who track expenses save on average 20% more per month.
empathy.stat_hard_to_save: Tracking every expense helps identify invisible money leaks.
empathy.stat_stress: Having a clear view of your finances reduces stress by 40%.
empathy.stat_plan_better: People who plan reach their financial goals 2x more often.
empathy.message: The good news? You just took the first step. And Mitsitsy is here to help you.
empathy.personalizedMessage: You've been dealing with this for {{duration}}. You want {{goal}}. The good news? You just took the first step.
empathy.cta: See how Mitsitsy can help me

solution.title: How Mitsitsy will help you
solution.subtitle: Here's what we've prepared for you
solution.benefit1Desc_dont_know_where: Charts by category to see exactly where your money goes
solution.benefit2Desc_dont_know_where: Never let an expense go unrecorded
solution.benefit3Desc_dont_know_where: Track how your spending evolves month by month
solution.benefit1Desc_hard_to_save: See your balance evolve in real time
solution.benefit2Desc_hard_to_save: Plan your expenses and stick to your budget
solution.benefit3Desc_hard_to_save: Identify expenses to cut and save more
solution.benefit1Desc_stress: All your finances at a glance, no surprises
solution.benefit2Desc_stress: Understand your habits to regain confidence
solution.benefit1Desc_plan_better: Prepare your purchases and anticipate expenses
solution.benefit2Desc_plan_better: Group your planned expenses by planification
solution.benefit3Desc_plan_better: Validate your plans and track your progress

wow.title: Try it yourself!
wow.subtitle: Tap each expense to see Mitsitsy in action
wow.successMessage: Great! See how easy it is?
wow.bubuleCongrats: Great job! See how easy it is to track your expenses!

tutorial.finalMessage: Your financial peace of mind starts now.

changelog.factoryReset: You can now reset the app to factory state from settings
changelog.deleteTransactions: Delete a transaction by tapping the trash icon
changelog.whatsNewPage: See what's new with every update
changelog.performanceOptimizations: The app is faster and smoother
changelog.malagasyLanguage: The app is now available in Malagasy
changelog.darkMode: Dark mode for comfortable use at night
changelog.feedbackModal: Share your ideas and suggestions directly in the app
changelog.currencyConversion: Switch currencies easily with live exchange rates
changelog.multipleAccounts: Manage multiple accounts: bank, cash and more
changelog.transferBetweenAccounts: Transfer money between your accounts in one tap
changelog.planificationSystem: Plan your expenses ahead of time
changelog.planificationGrouping: Planification transactions are grouped into a single card
changelog.autoDeleteEmptyPlanification: Planification is automatically deleted when all its transactions are removed
changelog.deleteModalNames: Names now display correctly in delete confirmation modals
changelog.gamificationSystem: Gamification system: earn XP and level up by tracking your finances
changelog.streaksAndChallenges: Daily streaks and challenges to keep you motivated
changelog.badgesAndAchievements: Badges and achievements to unlock as you manage your money
changelog.xpAndLevels: XP and level system with progress bar
changelog.dailyChallenges: Daily challenge to stay on top of your finances
changelog.gamificationNotifications: Smart notifications: streak reminders, daily challenges and weekly summary
changelog.reportsScreen: Reports screen: trend charts, category breakdown and detailed stats
changelog.calendarScreen: Expense calendar: view your spending day by day
changelog.reducedRedundancy: Cleaner interface with less repeated data across screens
changelog.transferFilter: Transfer filter now correctly shows transfers
changelog.transferNotCountedAsExpense: Transfers are no longer counted as expenses
changelog.bubuleMascot: Meet Bubule, your mascot and guide!
changelog.bubuleOnboarding: Bubule guides you through the entire onboarding
changelog.bubuleWowMoment: Bubule congratulates you when you complete the mini report
changelog.premiumUIRedesign: Redesigned interface with a premium look
changelog.speechBubbleDesign: Speech bubbles matching your theme colors
changelog.emptyStatesWithBubule: Bubule appears on empty screens to motivate you

gamification.challengeCompleted: Great job! Challenge completed. You're mastering your money.
gamification.levelUpMessage: You're taking control of your finances! Every step brings you closer to your goals.
gamification.challengeLogExpense: Track a spending to stay in control
gamification.challengeLog3: 3 transactions to keep your day on track
gamification.challengeCheckPlan: Review your plans to stay organized

gamification.badgeStreak30Desc: 30 days! You're on the path to financial freedom
gamification.badgeXP500Desc: Your financial discipline is paying off
gamification.badgeLevel5Desc: You're mastering your finances better than ever
gamification.badgeTransactions50Desc: 50 entries! You have a clear view of your money

gamification.notifChallengeBody: You still have a few hours to earn 50 XP

gamification.bubuleEncourage: Every penny counts, you're doing great!
